description: MEGA-Code hooks for session collection and skill generation

hooks.command: CC=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} GEM=${extensionPath} bash -c 'D="${CC:-$GEM}"; UV_CACHE_DIR="${UV_CACHE_DIR:-$D/.uv-cache}" uv run --directory "$D" python mega_code/client/collector.py --event SessionEnd'

CC=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} GEM=${extensionPath} bash -c 'D="${CC:-$GEM}"; UV_CACHE_DIR="${UV_CACHE_DIR:-$D/.uv-cache}" uv run --directory "$D" python mega_code/client/collector.py --event UserPromptSubmit'
CC=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} GEM=${extensionPath} bash -c 'D="${CC:-$GEM}"; UV_CACHE_DIR="${UV_CACHE_DIR:-$D/.uv-cache}" uv run --directory "$D" python mega_code/client/check_pending.py'
CC=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} GEM=${extensionPath} bash -c 'D="${CC:-$GEM}"; UV_CACHE_DIR="${UV_CACHE_DIR:-$D/.uv-cache}" uv run --directory "$D" python mega_code/client/collector.py --event Stop'

CC=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} GEM=${extensionPath} bash -c 'D="${CC:-$GEM}"; UV_CACHE_DIR="${UV_CACHE_DIR:-$D/.uv-cache}" uv run --directory "$D" python mega_code/client/collector.py --event UserPromptSubmit'
CC=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} GEM=${extensionPath} bash -c 'D="${CC:-$GEM}"; UV_CACHE_DIR="${UV_CACHE_DIR:-$D/.uv-cache}" uv run --directory "$D" python mega_code/client/check_pending.py'
